name: zimage_init
description: zImage_Init resets the font table, font globals, and texture-memory option binding.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zimage_init_helpers failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 40 unmasked mismatches, 48 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 105, VC object size 112, 12 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zimage_init_helpers/verify/46eb20_byte_triage.txt.
